summary: Made the previously unreachable pulse-not-scheduled diagnostic observable through the live audibility panel. When the direct audio pulse is not scheduled, the runtime now records window.__MC_AUDIBILITY_EVIDENCE__, exposes data-audibility-panel=pulse-failed and data-audibility-diagnosis=pulse-not-scheduled, announces the failure through the existing aria-live output, disables outcome buttons, and instructs the listener to retry.

verification.result: passed in isolated Node runtime using the exact committed source and test contents

runtime_contract.accessibility: existing aria-live output announces that the browser did not schedule the pulse and provides a retry instruction

limits: No Vercel deployment identity was available for commit 321e94521de3a7c1bcbb119a29fab669153b142e.
No iPhone Safari runtime or audible-speaker test was performed in this run.
A passing source contract does not prove deployed browser behavior.
falsification_route: Run node scripts/audibility-outcome-contract-check.mjs in a clean checkout.

On iPhone Safari activate the diagnostic with audio blocked or unscheduled and verify window.__MC_AUDIBILITY_EVIDENCE__.diagnosis equals pulse-not-scheduled and the panel exposes data-audibility-panel=pulse-failed.
privacy: No private chat, health information, credentials, payment logic, or identifying user material is included.
